title: Confluence: Rechiseled
description: Make Rechiseled usable with Confluence: Otherworld.
body:
This mod act as a coherence bridge enter Confluence: Otherworld and Rechiseled.

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed0ae73f5dcbe55e089ca8eba54f9c5fdbeb9cf4.png)
## Chisel uses
### Chisel cutting
The Chisel can now be used to cut all of the Confluence: Otherworld Blocks into they own variants.
![Chisel recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a09fbed06d328944f79d6d15962fea0853318ecb.png)
### In world chiseling
The chisel can also directly cut the placed blocks into they variants. (It will not work if the blocks have a different height. By exemple: solar plate have a height of 1 but disk block have a height of 0.25, so, a solar plate can be cut into 4 disk blocks but if a solar plate are in the ground, it cannot be directly cut into a disk block.)
![Automatic Chisel Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adcc3a592b83c9aae3a456ef7ff8da95161444b3.png)


![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed0ae73f5dcbe55e089ca8eba54f9c5fdbeb9cf4.png)
## New Chisel recipie
This mod also add a new recipe for the chisel because his recipe getting confused with the one of the iron short sword.

![New Chisel Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffda7bca1375446e961f96a85f746f781d0c4c2f.png)

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed0ae73f5dcbe55e089ca8eba54f9c5fdbeb9cf4.png)
## Depandances
Of course, this mod needs [Confluence: Otherworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/confluence) and [Rechiseled](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled) and they own depencies.

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed0ae73f5dcbe55e089ca8eba54f9c5fdbeb9cf4.png)
## Future functionnalities ?  
We will continue to maintain this project for any missing coherences or issues but will not add any blocks variants now. ( Potentially in the future, if we have enough time. )
